title: Madesa Executive Computer Writing Desk 53 Inch with 3 Drawers and 1 Door, Metalic Handles Wooden Home Office PC Study Table with Storage - Black
features: ELEGANT: With a sleek design and premium metal knobs, it fits in your office space, bedroom, kids room, or vanity area
AMPLE STORAGE: 3 drawers that open up completely, 1 cabinet door with 2 compartments
DIMENSIONS: 30'' H 18'' D 54'' L, Weight Capacity per Shelf: 11 lbs, Tabletop Weight Capacity: 66lbs
FUNCTIONAL: Ideal for work, study, and daily use, storing all your tools and keeping your space organized
HIGH QUALITY PARTICLE BOARD: Manufactured with Renewable Wood, protected with 7 layers of premium paint
CLEAR INSTRUCTIONS: Includes user-friendly illustrated instructions and hardware for a simple assembly, along with QR Code for video instructions.
description: Product Description What material is the desk made out of? It’s made out of manufactured/engineered wood. Can you switch the sides to install the cabinet and drawers? Hello, no you can not. Does this desk have a finished back? Hi there, no. It's not painted at the back. Shop our products!
